nasb.text: I have not departed from the command of His lips; I have treasured the words of His mouth more than my necessary food.

esv.text: I have not departed from the commandment of his lips; I have treasured the words of his mouth more than my portion of food.

cnv.text: 他嘴唇的命令我沒有離棄， 我珍藏他口中的言語， 勝過我需用的飲食。

ccb.text: 我没有违背祂的诫命， 我珍视祂的话语胜过我日用的饮食。
